title: Make lobby Discord notification manual button

log.context: Make lobby Discord notification manual button

Done. Here's what changed:

**commons-server** (`/mnt/data/commons-server/src/index.ts`):
- Removed the fire-and-forget Discord fetch from `POST /api/clungiverse/lobby/create` — creating a lobby no longer pings Discord
- Added new `POST /api/clungiverse/lobby/:id/notify-discord` endpoint — looks up the lobby, posts `⚔️ **Adventurer** created a Clungiverse lobby! Join here: https://clung.us/clungiverse?lobby=<id>` to channel `1488315244190236723` (#clungiverse), returns `{ok: true}` or surfaces e...(truncated)
